decisions.name: 投诉 SLA 截止时间
投诉 SLA 截止时间

placeholder.zh-CN: 选择未开通账号的人员
placeholder.en-US: Select an employee without an account

confirm.zh-CN: 确认为该成员生成新的临时密码？临时密码只会显示一次。
confirm.en-US: Generate a new temporary password for this member? It will be shown only once.

description.zh-CN: 控制账号开通、注册入口与密码找回的总体策略。
description.en: Controls account onboarding, public registration, and password recovery behavior.

description.zh-CN: 定义用户密码必须满足的长度和字符组成要求。
description.en: Defines password length and character composition requirements.

description.zh-CN: 限制历史密码复用，并控制密码与重置令牌的有效期。
description.en: Limits password reuse and controls password and reset-token lifetime.

description.zh-CN: 连续登录失败后自动锁定账号，降低暴力破解风险。
description.en: Locks accounts after repeated failed sign-in attempts.

description.zh-CN: 说明当前只读视图的策略来源和交付边界。
description.en: Explains the policy source and delivery boundary of this read-only view.

message.zh-CN: 确认应用此模板？这将在当前租户创建模板包含的模型与页面。
message.en-US: Install this template? It will create the template's models and pages in your tenant.
